overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime exploration of a dystopian urban district. The player walks through a rain-soaked plaza with palm trees, passes under a concrete overpass, ascends stairs past NPCs, and traverses an elevated walkway with vibrant neon signage and atmospheric haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with palm trees overlooking neon-lit district

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through wet paved plaza toward a distant neon-lit building complex

entered.detail: tall palm trees with fronds silhouetted against the night sky
large building facade covered in colorful glowing advertisements and holographic displays
metal barrel with open fire providing orange light on the wet ground
elevated concrete highway overpass with support columns

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide plaza with wet pavement reflecting the ambient light. Palm trees line the path while a massive building covered in bright neon billboards dominates the distant view. A burning barrel sits in the middle of the plaza as the player walks steadily forward toward an overpass structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete underpass beneath highway overpass with parked vehicles

events.description: enters covered area beneath concrete overpass with reduced lighting

agents.ego_description: walking under the concrete overpass through a dimly lit underpass area

entered.detail: massive concrete bridge structure overhead with rough texture and support beams
abandoned cars scattered beneath the overpass in shadows

segments.scene_description: The player moves into a sheltered underpass beneath a massive concrete highway overpass. The lighting drops significantly, creating deep shadows where abandoned vehicles are parked. The neon building remains visible in the distance to the left as the camera passes through the concrete corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: street with green neon-lit building facade and industrial tower ahead

events.description: exits underpass into open street with prominent green neon building on left

agents.ego_description: walking along the street toward a tall industrial tower with green neon lights illuminating the left side

notable_agents.action: character walking ahead on the path toward the distant tower

entered.detail: low-rise building with bright green neon strip lights running along its roofline
massive cylindrical industrial structure with scaffolding and platforms rising into the haze

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the underpass, the scene opens onto a street lined with a building featuring vivid green neon lighting on the left. A massive industrial tower looms ahead in the distance through the atmospheric haze. A lone NPC walks ahead on the path as the player continues forward toward a set of stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete staircase with NPCs resting on steps leading to upper level

events.description: begins ascending wide concrete staircase with metal handrails

agents.ego_description: climbing concrete stairs while passing NPCs sitting on the steps to the right

notable_agents.action: two individuals sitting on the stairs to the right side conversing
person standing near the top of the stairs looking down

entered.detail: wide weathered concrete staircase with metal handrails on both sides
silver metal pipe railing running along the left side of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The player ascends a broad concrete staircase flanked by metal handrails. Two NPCs sit conversing on the steps to the right while another stands near the top. The industrial tower grows larger ahead as the green neon building recedes into the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway with colorful painted pavement overlooking lower neon district

events.description: reaches top of stairs entering elevated walkway with vibrant multicolored painted ground
turns right to follow the elevated path overlooking the lower plaza area

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated walkway looking down at the neon-lit district below

entered.detail: pavement painted with vibrant multicolored geometric patterns in red, yellow, and blue
low concrete barrier with metal rail overlooking the lower level

segments.scene_description: At the top of the stairs, the player enters an elevated walkway with strikingly colorful painted pavement. The path follows a concrete railing that overlooks the lower district, providing an elevated view of the neon billboard building and the plaza below. The camera turns right to follow the walkway along the overlook.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a rain-soaked urban plaza through a dark underpass and up toward an elevated city overlook. It begins by moving across wet pavement reflecting ambient light, passing palm trees and a burning barrel while heading toward a massive neon-covered building. As the camera enters the sheltered underpass beneath a concrete highway, the lighting drops into deep shadows among abandoned vehicles before emerging back into the haze toward a vivid green neon building and a looming industrial tower. The scene then shifts upward as the camera ascends a broad concrete staircase past conversing NPCs, causing the green building to recede while the industrial tower grows larger. Finally, the movement leads onto an elevated walkway with colorful painted pavement, where the camera turns right to overlook the neon billboards and the plaza below.
